mapper.select: select a.seq as seq, a.title as name, (select pc.name from production_company pc where a.company_seq = pc.seq) as companyName, (select truncate(ifnull(avg(c.score), 0), 1) from comment c WHERE c.anime_seq = a.seq and c.deleted = false) as score, (select count(c.seq) from comment c WHERE c.anime_seq = a.seq and c.deleted = false) as commentCnt from anime a order by score desc, commentCnt desc limit 10;
